The right panel shows one model standing centered on a city sidewalk with glass buildings, trees, street signs, and a black hanging banner in the background, posing confidently with one hand near her hip. Left model: A cute gothic lolita idol outfit on {argument name="left character style" default="a young woman with long ash-blonde silver wavy twin-tail hair tied with dark blue ribbons"}. The pose is edgy and confident, one leg forward, one hand at the waist, the other relaxed.

The right panel includes a black vertical street banner with a white abstract X logo and small text resembling “CROSS NIGHT.”

Visual style: 2.5D hybrid of photorealistic street photography and polished AI cosplay illustration, crisp clothing textures, realistic lighting and shadows, high-fashion street snap composition, vibrant but natural colors. content:
8K UHD hyper-realistic commercial food photography, 3:4 aspect ratio. 6 scenes, each on its own solid or gradient background:

Scene 1, Döner slice explosion: {argument name="food" default="Traditional Turkish döner (beef and lamb mix)"}, paper-thin ribbons spiraling outward mid-air, white garlic sauce and red chili sauce splashing, fresh parsley leaves floating. {argument name="background" default="Deep crimson red background"}.

Scene 2, Dürüm wrap floating: Premium dürüm cut in half and floating vertically, cross-section revealing döner meat, lettuce, tomatoes, onions layered inside, white garlic yogurt sauce drizzling elegantly, subtle spice particles drifting. Warm terracotta orange background.

Scene 3, Sauce pour drama: Mound of freshly sliced döner with crispy charred edges, thick creamy garlic yogurt sauce pouring from above frozen mid-flow, spicy red chili sauce drizzling alongside in thin crimson streams, sliced tomatoes and parsley below, heat vapor rising. Dark charcoal black background.

Scene 4, Deconstructed composition: Toasted lavash bread pieces, döner slices, tomato slices, lettuce leaves, and onion rings all suspended separately at varying heights, glossy sauce ribbons connecting elements artistically, ultra-fine spice dust in the air. Muted sage green background.

Scene 5, Rotating spit close-up: Extreme close-up of vertical döner tower on spit, large döner knife frozen mid-slice, fresh slice falling away, charred bits and seasoning particles in air, heat vapor rising from the fresh cut. Rich golden amber background.

Scene 6, Overhead plate explosion: Top-down view, all ingredients bursting upward in circular pattern, döner slices, french fries, grilled peppers and tomatoes, fresh parsley, sumac, lemon wedges, sauce droplets spraying, elements at varying heights with some rotating. Deep burgundy red background with vignette.

Global: {argument name="lighting" default="controlled studio lighting"} emphasizing meat texture and char marks, shallow to medium depth of field, rich contrast, warm savory tones, natural shine, appetizing color grading. No text, logos, people, hands, cartoon style, or plastic-looking food.

content:
Use the attached character sheet as a STRICT design reference. Do not change the face, hairstyle, eye shape, or proportions under any circumstances.

■ Purpose: To fully commercialize the character as a Japanese "{argument name="product name" default="chibi eraser product"}" and create realistic packaged product photos like those sold in stationery stores or gashapon machines.

■ Concept: "Bagged chibi eraser products sold in 100-yen shops and stationery stores."

■ Eraser Main Body: (Maintain exact same specs as before) - Strongly deformed chibi character - Thick block shape - Fully matte rubber material - Fine particles/powder/chips/wear present - Print misalignment/color variations - Random configuration of 50+ items.

■ Packaging (CRITICAL): - Small transparent plastic bag (OPP bag) - Paper header at the top (with hanging hole) - Slightly cheap printing on the header (slight misalignment/ink unevenness) - Wrinkled vinyl, slightly cloudy, sticking to contents due to static - Some air inside causing bulging - Light warping on the sealed section.

■ Graphic Design: - Japanese children's stationery style - Pop and colorful ({argument name="color theme" default="pink, yellow, light blue"} base) - Handwritten-style or rounded fonts - Product logo (original okay) - Text like 'Mini-Keshi' or 'Chibi-Keshi' - Stars, hearts, sparkle decorations.

■ Informational Elements (Enhanced Realism): - JAN code (barcode) - 'Ages 6 and up' - 'Not edible' warning - 'Total X types' or 'Randomly included' - Small company name (fictional) - MADE IN JAPAN or CHINA markings.

■ Composition: - Packaging is main in center of frame - A few spilled erasers around - 1 or 2 out of the bag - A fingertip picking one up for effect - Natural feel with some frame-out.

■ Rare Element: - Mix in one special individual with fluorescent color or gradient - Place in a prominent position to guide the viewer's gaze.

■ Lighting: - Bright natural light (slightly high-key) - Soft shadows - Cleanliness like a product catalog photo.

■ Camera: - Macro-leaning - Shallow depth of field - Sharp center.

■ Background: - White to pastel table - Subtle dots or pop patterns - Simple and clean.

■ Prohibited: - Plastic feel - glossy expression - Overly high-end texture (cheapness is correct) - Overly perfect printing.

■ Output: - A level indistinguishable from real products - Reality like items found in convenience stores or 100-yen shops - Quality that makes people on SNS say 'I want this.'
title: Chibi Eraser Product Photography
description: Generates realistic product photography of collectible Japanese chibi erasers in retail packaging, based on a character reference.

content:
Create a white t-shirt product mockup (flat lay, front view, plain white background).

The t-shirt design uses black line art only. No color fill. No shading. White shirt throughout.

Illustration style: hand-drawn with a soft pencil or crayon. Lines are slightly wobbly and uneven, with inconsistent pressure — some strokes faint, some darker. Outlines do not always close perfectly. The overall impression is a casual, childlike sketch — imperfect but charming. Minimal detail. No clean vector lines. No digital precision.

The t-shirt has four printed zones:

TOP CENTER: Reproduce the festival logo from the first attached image exactly as-is — do not alter the font, layout, or graphic style in any way. Place it prominently at the top center of the shirt. Make it large enough to read clearly. Do NOT apply the hand-drawn or yuru-kyara style to this logo.

TOP RIGHT: A hand-drawn jagged speech bubble (spiky, explosive edges — like a shouting manga effect), slightly smaller than the character illustration. Inside the bubble, write "{argument name="dialogue" default="[Insert dialogue here]"}" in clumsy, uneven hand-lettered characters. The bubble and text should feel comic and energetic.

MIDDLE: Redraw the character from the attached image in a loose, casual, yuru-kyara style — simplified, childlike, charmingly imperfect. Use the attached image as the sole reference for pose, expression, and content. Draw the character smaller — occupying no more than 40% of the shirt's height. Leave generous white space around the figure. The speech bubble may overlap with the top portion of the character illustration. Do not shrink the character to avoid overlap.

BOTTOM: The artist name "{argument name="artist name" default="[Insert artist name here]"}" hand-lettered in uneven, shaky characters — as if written slowly and clumsily by hand with a pencil.

Keep all elements well-spaced and balanced. Clean, minimal, no background decoration.

Top row contains 3 larger brand assets: 1) a minimal circular mountain-line logo with the word FJÄLL and small subtext, 2) an alternate logo with a small abstract mountain/stone icon above the word FJÄLL and the tagline “NORDIC SKINCARE”, 3) a square product still-life photo of one dark gray skincare tube standing upright on a pale stone surface with a rock prop. Bottom row contains exactly 8 campaign mockups, evenly spaced and aligned: 1) square lifestyle product photo with hands holding the tube beside a cream product information card, 2) square close-up of a gray clay/mineral cream smear on stone with tiny text “MINERAL TEXTURE”, 3) vertical application tutorial tile showing cream being applied to fingers with a simple header, 4) vertical dew/balm hand-care tile showing cream rubbed onto the back of a hand, 5) square hero ingredient tile with the tube standing among stones, leaves, and three circular ingredient callouts, 6) vertical social media video interface mockup with a hand holding the product, visible play/engagement UI icons along the side and bottom, 7) vertical ad poster with the product tube, botanical sprigs, rock props, and headline text near the bottom, 8) tall mobile website or landing-page mockup with a clean navigation bar, product detail blocks, and an application photo.

Subject details: The product is a single squeeze tube labeled {argument name="product label" default="FJÄLL"}, matte dark blue-gray packaging, white minimalist typography, small circular emblem, premium cosmetic proportions. The skincare texture is thick, mineral, clay-like, pale gray-beige. Hands should look natural, softly lit, and elegant. Props include smooth stones, mineral rocks, small green leaves, neutral linen or plaster surfaces, and shallow shadows.

Text content: Include readable brand text “FJÄLL” on logos and packaging, “NORDIC SKINCARE” as a tagline, and campaign/product text suggesting {argument name="product name" default="Midnight Solstice"}, {argument name="benefit phrase" default="Performance in every touch."}, mineral texture, application, dew-bomb, and ingredient callouts. Keep small body copy mostly decorative but plausible, clean, and aligned.

Visual style: Luxury skincare art direction, minimal Swiss editorial layout, soft product photography, airy whitespace, muted natural palette, understated typography, commercial creative portfolio look. Make the entire board appear like a polished generated ad-material batch preview rather than a single ad.

Constraints: Use exactly 11 visible tiles total, exactly 3 on the top row and exactly 8 on the bottom row. Do not add extra products beyond the one tube design. Avoid bright colors, clutter, heavy shadows, glossy plastic, cartoon style, or watermarks.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 portrait product photo, close-up three-quarter view from slightly above, the acrylic block standing upright on a lace-covered tabletop. Use shallow depth of field with a dark violet studio background, purple bokeh lights, crystal beads, pearls, faceted gems, and soft glowing candles in the distance.

Main object: A large rectangular clear acrylic block, about 5–7 cm thick, with polished beveled edges, visible stacked transparent layers, refractive side walls, internal reflections, caustics, and glossy highlights. The front face is covered with delicate gold and white foil-like printed decorations, while the anime artwork appears suspended across many internal acrylic layers for a deep 3D collage effect.

Central artwork: Inside the block, show {argument name="character name" default="an elegant faceless anime heroine"} wearing a dark purple and black fantasy kimono-style gown with flowing translucent sleeves, ribbon-like fabric, lavender floral ornaments, and long black-purple hair spreading through the composition. Her face is intentionally obscured by a small soft-edged purple square censor block centered over the head. She holds or is surrounded by glowing paper lanterns. Behind her, include a radiant violet moon or circular magical halo, starry night textures, sparkling mist, and an umbrella-like fan silhouette. Overall mood: mysterious, romantic, luxurious, nocturnal.

Color and lighting: Dominant palette of deep violet, amethyst, indigo, black, lavender, transparent crystal, and metallic gold. Strong internal purple glow from behind the character, rim lighting through the acrylic edges, glitter particles, prismatic refractions, and highly realistic product-photography reflections.

Decorative printed elements: Use exactly 7 prominent decorative motif groups on the acrylic surface: 1) gold and white butterflies scattered near the top and lower front, 2) floral garlands and blossoms along the left and bottom edges, 3) ornate filigree frames and corner borders, 4) tiny stars and sparkles throughout, 5) hanging lantern illustrations integrated with the character, 6) a pink heart gem sticker on the right side, 7) crescent moon and chain ornaments near the bottom left.

Floating creatures: Include exactly 3 red goldfish inside the acrylic scene: one on the left side near the character’s sleeve, one mid-right near the character’s hand, and one larger goldfish in the lower-right foreground. Make them appear suspended in different acrylic layers with different depths and refractions.

Visible text printed on the object: Add ornate gold script and small serif typography as part of the premium packaging design. Include {argument name="main title text" default="Eternal Night"} at the top left, Chinese vertical text {argument name="vertical label text" default="永恒的夜"} on the left side, the word {argument name="decorative script text" default="Beautiful"} in large cursive gold at lower left, a small serial label "No. 5201314" at upper right, and a small quote plaque at lower right reading {argument name="quote text" default="You are The one Makes me Smile"}. Additional tiny decorative microtext may be present but should be secondary and not dominate.

Surface setting: Place the acrylic block on ornate white lace fabric with scattered purple crystals, pink rhinestones, pearl strands, and glossy beads in the foreground. The surroundings should feel like a luxury collectible product shoot, not a flat illustration.

Style and quality: Hyper-realistic macro product photography combined with anime illustration trapped inside acrylic; extremely sharp front details, realistic transparent material, layered parallax, high contrast purple lighting, premium handmade merchandise aesthetic, no watermark, no extra characters, no packaging box, no hands.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 website hero screen, dark black/navy background, full-bleed cyber grid floor receding in perspective, glowing magenta and cyan circuitry framing the edges. High contrast, glossy reflections, electric neon bloom, futuristic HUD aesthetic.

Layout: Top navigation bar with the brand logo on the left and exactly 5 navigation items on the right: “SALE”, “FEATURE”, “ITEMS”, “FAQ”, and a bordered neon button “CHECK NOW”. The hero section is split into two columns: left text-and-CTA area, right large promotional banner graphic.

Left hero content: Add a small rounded pill label reading {argument name="campaign name" default="CYBER FLASH CAMPAIGN"}. Main headline in Japanese and English: “今だけの” above huge bold “FLASH SALE”, white letters with hot-pink glow. Below it, two short Japanese description lines: “対象アイテムが期間限定でスペシャルプライス。” and “7/15(火) 13:59までの限定オファーをお見逃しなく。” Add a neon outlined limited-time bar with a clock icon and text “LIMITED TIME : 7/15(火) 13:59まで”. Beneath are exactly 2 CTA buttons: a hot-pink filled glowing button “今すぐチェック ›” and a cyan outlined button “対象商品を見る ›”. At the bottom of the left column, show exactly 3 small benefit chips with icons: truck icon “送料無料”, user icon “会員限定特典”, gift icon “数量限定”.

Right promotional graphic: A large square/near-square neon poster card with a glowing magenta border and cyan HUD corner details, set slightly right of center. Inside the card, show a futuristic city street at night with skyscrapers, magenta/cyan lights, and a perspective grid road. Center a large neon alarm clock outline containing bold stacked text “FLASH SALE” and cyan text “LIMITED OFFER”. Below it, add Japanese “期間限定”, then the deadline {argument name="deadline text" default="7/15(火) 13:59まで"}, then a bright magenta rounded button “CHECK NOW”. Include small decorative HUD charts, circular targets, circuit marks, and arrows around the poster, but keep all text legible.

Visual style: Use black, deep navy, hot magenta, electric cyan, and white. Typography should be bold condensed sans-serif for English sale text, clean modern Japanese sans-serif for Japanese copy. Add strong neon glows, thin circuit-line borders, chromatic highlights, and polished reflections on the grid floor.

Constraints: Desktop website first-view only, no browser chrome, no people, no extra product images, no watermark. Keep the exact visible counts: 5 navigation items, 2 CTA buttons, 3 benefit chips, and 1 large right-side sale poster. Make the composition feel like a finished PC landing page hero based on a banner design.

content:
Goal: Create a premium Japanese potato chips package mockup inspired by a dark Catholic/European saint painting, using a black glossy snack bag with ornate gold typography and luxury limited-edition branding.

Canvas: Front-facing vertical product package, centered on a clean white background, realistic crinkled plastic potato chip bag with serrated sealed edges at top and bottom. Use a tall 3:4 composition, slightly rounded pillow-pack shape, glossy black material with strong highlights and folds.

Layout: At the very top center place a refined gold brand mark with a small crown and decorative flourishes reading {argument name="brand name" default="San Ignacio"}, with small katakana beneath it. Under that, add a short Japanese tagline in small white-gold text. Across the upper middle, place a very large embossed metallic-gold Japanese product title reading {argument name="product title" default="ポテトチップス"}. In the upper-left corner, add one vertical gold ribbon label reading {argument name="limited label" default="期間限定"}. The central-left area contains a framed religious oil-painting style portrait of Saint Ignatius in a black robe, halo, smoky clouds, and glowing sacred heart; place a neutral blurred rectangular mask over the face. The right middle contains a circular gold ornamental flavor badge with Japanese text reading {argument name="flavor text" default="聖イグナチオの スパイシー 黒胡椒味"}. The lower-left has one circular laurel badge reading "国産じゃがいも 100% 使用". The lower center foreground contains exactly 3 large golden ridged potato chips overlapping each other. The lower-right foreground contains exactly 1 small bowl filled with black peppercorns, plus exactly 2 red chili peppers and sprigs of green herbs. Along the bottom-left background, add a dark silhouette of a European church or cathedral at sunset. At the very bottom center, add one gold ribbon banner reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="イエズス会の精神を、味わいに込めて。"}, and add tiny disclaimer-style Japanese text at bottom right.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic commercial packaging design, luxury black-and-gold palette, embossed foil lettering, Baroque religious ornament, fine gold filigree borders, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, realistic chip texture with black pepper speckles, premium limited-edition snack branding. Keep all text integrated onto the bag surface with perspective and plastic wrinkles.

Constraints: Show exactly 1 product bag, 1 left ribbon label, 1 central saint portrait, 1 right circular flavor badge, 1 lower-left 100% badge, 3 visible potato chips, 1 peppercorn bowl, 2 red chili peppers, and 1 bottom banner. Do not add hands, people outside the illustration, extra packages, watermarks, or English replacement text for the Japanese package copy.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical premium potato chips package design based on an ornate anime princess illustration, like a finished retail snack bag mockup.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 product-package image, full front view of a glossy crinkled potato chip bag with sealed ridged top and bottom edges. Use a deep midnight navy and black-purple background with gold trim, sparkles, tiny stars, and luxury confectionery styling.

Main subject: On the left and center, show an elegant anime-style princess bride wearing an elaborate white lace gown with gold embroidery, jeweled bodice, pearl details, bows, floral appliqués, and a translucent veil flowing across the package. She holds a bouquet of yellow, cream, and pink roses. Her face area is covered by a plain centered beige rectangular placeholder, as if the character portrait can be swapped in later. Her long pale silver-blonde hair and veil blend into a magical starry night background.

Brand and text layout: At the upper right, place an ornate gold logo frame with a small crown and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Étoile de Reine"}, with the small Japanese subtitle 「エトワール・ドゥ・レーヌ」 beneath it. Below the logo, add a small elegant Japanese tagline 「やさしい時間を、ひとくちのごほうびに。」. Make the largest central headline in Japanese read {argument name="main product text" default="ポテトチップス"} in creamy white with a gold glow. At the top left, add a vertical hanging ribbon label in dark navy and gold that says {argument name="limited label" default="期間限定"}.

Flavor badge: On the right middle, create a cream circular ornamental label with gold filigree and flowers. Text inside should read 「ふんわり香る」 above the main flavor {argument name="flavor text" default="はちみつ バター味"}. Add a small mauve ribbon across the badge reading 「やさしい甘さとコク」. Beneath it, include small Japanese copy: 「はちみつのやさしい甘さと バターのコクがとろける、 幸せな味わい。」

Food elements: In the lower right foreground, show exactly 5 large golden potato chips overlapping, with visible seasoning specks and realistic crisp texture. To their right, show exactly 1 small glass bowl of honey with exactly 1 wooden honey dipper dripping honey. In front of it, show exactly 1 small white dish holding exactly 1 square pat of butter.

Quality badge and decorative elements: In the lower left, add a cream and gold circular badge reading 「国産じゃがいも 100% 使用」. Decorate the bottom left with pink roses and small flowers. Along the bottom, place a dark ribbon banner with gold trim reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="星降る夜のような、やさしいごほうび。"}. Add tiny legal text at bottom right: 「※写真・イラストはイメージです。」

Visual style: Highly polished Japanese luxury snack packaging, glossy plastic reflections, realistic package folds and highlights, ornate gold typography, soft magical lighting, detailed anime illustration, romantic royal theme, premium limited-edition feel. Keep all text legible and arranged like a real retail package. Do not add extra characters, extra food items, logos, barcodes, or watermarks.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic full-color snack package mockup for a baseball-themed potato chips bag, designed like a glossy crinkled Japanese retail package.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 product shot, front-facing sealed potato chip bag filling almost the entire frame, with red heat-sealed crimped edges at the top and bottom, transparent plastic highlights, wrinkles, creases, and reflective glare.

Main design: A warm sepia, kraft-paper, vintage sports-illustration background with dark red accents. Feature a dramatic hand-drawn baseball pitcher in a white uniform with red trim and a red cap, mid-throw, placed on the left half of the package. The uniform chest reads Carp in red script. The player wears a black baseball glove and red undersleeves. The face area is covered by a plain opaque brown rectangular block, centered over the face, as if anonymized.

Branding and text: At the top center, show the English logo {argument name="brand name" default="Carp Legend"} in dark red cursive with small baseball and star decorations. Under it, include small Japanese-style subtitle text. Make the largest central headline a bold dark red Japanese product title, {argument name="product name" default="ポテトチップス"}. On the right, place a large circular flavor seal with the main flavor text {argument name="flavor label" default="ガーリック ペッパー味"}, surrounded by smaller supporting copy. Add a red ribbon across the flavor seal with punchy short copy. At top left, add one vertical hanging red badge with gold border and stars, containing {argument name="limited badge text" default="期間限定"}. At bottom left, add one baseball-shaped seal reading {argument name="ingredient badge text" default="国産じゃがいも 100% 使用"}. Along the bottom, add a beige ribbon slogan with dark lettering.

Counted visible elements: Include exactly 4 major labeled package callouts: 1 top-left limited badge, 1 top-center brand logo area, 1 right circular flavor seal, and 1 bottom-left baseball ingredient seal. Include exactly 4 prominent potato chips in the foreground, overlapping at the bottom center, golden yellow with ridges and black pepper specks. Include exactly 5 seasoning props on the lower right: 1 whole garlic bulb, 2 peeled garlic cloves, 1 small wooden bowl, and 1 pile of black peppercorns in and around the bowl.

Visual style: Premium illustrated food packaging, nostalgic Japanese baseball poster art, textured crosshatching, aged paper tones, deep burgundy typography, golden lighting, realistic plastic bag reflections, appetizing food photography for the chips and garlic. Keep the image richly colored, not black and white.

Constraints: No extra characters, no hands outside the illustration, no watermark, no background outside the package except a thin neutral edge. Keep all text integrated into the printed bag design and maintain a realistic sealed snack-bag shape.

content:
Goal: Create a premium Japanese potato chips package design based on an illustration-world concept, turning a royal character into a colorful snack bag advertisement.

Canvas: Front-facing vertical product package mockup, 3:4 aspect ratio, isolated on a clean white background. The bag should look like glossy crinkled plastic with sealed ridged edges at the top and bottom, subtle folds, highlights, shadows, and slight perspective bulging like a real snack bag.

Package design: Use an elegant white, burgundy, and metallic gold color palette. The top and bottom bands are deep burgundy with gold trim lines; the main center area is pale white/cream with a faint palace or marble-column background. Add ornate gold flourishes, crown motifs, and premium European royal styling.

Brand and main text: At the top center place a gold crown logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Reggbis"} with small Japanese reading beneath it. In the top-left corner add a vertical burgundy ribbon badge reading 「期間限定」. Across the upper center, add small copy reading 「白の王子様と味わう贅沢なひととき」. The largest central product name should read 「ポテトチップス」 in bold metallic-gold Japanese lettering. On the right, inside an ornate gold frame with a crown, write 「白の王子様の 焦がしバター コンソメ味」. Beneath it add smaller copy: 「芳醇なコクとバターの余韻が広がる、贅沢な味わい。」

Main subject: Show one elegant white prince character occupying the left and center of the package art. The prince has long pale-blond hair and wears a white military-style royal uniform with gold embroidery, epaulettes, decorative buttons, a high collar, lace cuffs, and a red cape draped over one shoulder. Pose him confidently with one hand on his hip and the other hand raised near his head. The face is intentionally covered by a plain rectangular censor-like beige blur, preserving the package aesthetic. Use {argument name="character theme" default="white prince"} as the core character concept.

Food elements: Show exactly 4 food items in the lower-right foreground: 2 golden potato chips, 1 small round bowl of glossy brown consommé sauce, and 1 pat of butter melting on a yellow puddle. Chips should look crisp, lightly speckled, and appetizing, overlapping the lower part of the character and package.

Badges and footer: Add one diamond-shaped burgundy-and-gold badge at the lower left reading 「国産じゃがいも 100% 使用」 with a small crown. Along the bottom burgundy band write “Premium Potato Chips” in elegant gold cursive. Add tiny Japanese disclaimer text at the bottom right, similar to product-package fine print.

Visual style: Realistic commercial snack packaging mockup mixed with polished anime/cosplay illustration art, high-detail glossy plastic, luxury Japanese limited-edition product design, warm gold lighting, sharp typography, premium supermarket snack aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the design as a single potato chip bag only, no hands holding it, no extra products, no background scene outside the package, and make all Japanese text legible and positioned like authentic Japanese snack packaging.

Photorealistic, glossy gel finish, elegant, and clean. Avoid cartoon/illustration styles, distorted fingers, or low-quality textures.

content: Please use only 1 real person's photo uploaded by the user as the sole identity reference to originally extend the person into a collectible designer vinyl figure in the {argument name="style direction" default="POP MART Hirono"} aesthetic, and output a high-completion single figure product scene image. Strictly preserve the real person's recognizability, including face shape, facial features relationship, hairstyle outline, sense of age, gender characteristics, skin tone tendency, overall temperament, and recognizable clothing identity and accessory features from the original photo, so that the final figure can clearly be identified as the same person from the uploaded photo. The overall style must clearly lean towards POP MART / Hirono designer vinyl aesthetics: quiet, soft, restrained, slightly melancholic, and pensive, like high-end Pop Mart collectible trendy toys rather than an ordinary cute plush. The figure should use big-head-small-body proportions, with the head about 2.5 to 3 times the size of the body, a short and rounded body, simplified limbs, and slightly larger shoes/socks, overall possessing a real sense of solid sculpture and weight. The posture should be calm, slightly leaning forward or slightly bowing the head, carrying a bit of character emotion without exaggerated movements. Faces must retain the original features but transform them into the Hirono vibe: half-open or slightly drooping sleepy eyes, thicker painted eyelashes, a small and restrained slightly pouty mouth, minimalist nose, rounded face shape, very faint blush or a few freckles, with expressions being slightly dazed, slightly world-weary, or slightly melancholic—no bright smiles or shiny anime eyes. Hair should retain the outline of the original photo but must be made into a solid, rounded, bundled, faceted handmade sculptural structure, not real hair strands, with hair colors using low-saturation natural colors like {argument name="hair color" default="soft brown, grey-brown, or soft black"} and matte treatment. Clothing should retain the original outfit's temperament but be simplified into thick, rounded, toy-like sculptural clothing blocks, potentially slightly oversized, with a few toy-like stitches, patches, or slight wear-and-tear details, avoiding real fabric textures. Recognizable accessories from the original photo like coffee cups, small bags, flowers, popsicles, books, or small dolls can be kept but must be transformed into slightly exaggeratedly proportioned matte figure accessories. The material must be high-end matte vinyl / matte resin / matte ceramic feel, with slight handmade sculpture marks and hand-painted texture, avoiding glossy, mirror highlights, glass feel, real skin, real hair, or visible texture maps. The scene should output a single full-body figure product image, not a grid, series display, packaging poster, or full blind box set. Place the figure in an exquisite, three-dimensional, unified miniature theme scene like a brand trendy toy product poster. The scene can be one of {argument name="scene theme" default="daily coffee, garden corner, cloud daydreaming, quiet study, moonlit daze, or animal companionship"}, requiring it to be three-dimensional, exquisite, photographic, and not overly complex. Lighting should use soft diffused product photography light with clean highlights, soft shadows, and neutral exposure, making the overall image look like a high-end Pop Mart new product shot. Strictly avoid ordinary Q-version illustrations, 2D anime feel, Korean webtoon style, Barbie doll look, realistic 3D plush feel, or complex cluttered backgrounds.

content: Main Subject: A clear, cylindrical glass bottle of serum or lotion from the brand "{argument name="brand name" default="SIUVA"}". The bottle is centered, filled with a very {argument name="liquid color" default="subtle pale green"} liquid (use the attached image of the bottle). Composition and Action: A dynamic composition of high-speed water splashing. The bottle is surrounded and framed by a moving jet of water and crystalline splashes moving around it. Surrounding Elements (Fruits and Leaves): Oranges: Two whole (unpeeled) oranges are visible behind the splashes on the left and right. A cut half-orange is behind the splashes in the upper right. A perfectly cut orange wedge (segment) is in the foreground in the lower left. Limes: A cut lime slice is to the right of the bottle, surrounded by Water. A wedge of cut lime is in the foreground at the bottom right. Leaves: Vibrant green mint sprigs and leaves are scattered by the splashing water to the left, above, and below, adding visual freshness. Background and Base: Background: A cool, muted teal-green blurred gradient background (bokeh), darkening slightly towards the edges. Base: The bottle and lower fruit wedges are submerged in or resting just above a surface of moving water, which also has minor splashes. Lighting: High-quality, very sharp, professional studio lighting. A water ring light or backlight makes the water droplets sparkle and resemble crystals. The key light is soft but defines all the edges of the fruit and bottle Style: High-resolution (8k), ultra-realistic commercial product photography. The focus should be on the details of the water droplets and the texture of the orange and lime peels. The rendering of the fruit textures (pulp and peel) and the water should be of studio quality. Perspective: Frontal shot at eye level, showing the bottle as the central focus, but with depth of field so that the background elements are slightly softened, in portrait format.

content: Create a high-end studio product photograph of a handmade {argument name="character" default="Cheshire Cat"} plush toy sitting centered on a matte black display pedestal against a seamless dark charcoal background. The plush is a dark blue-gray velvet cat with a round chubby body, oversized triangular ears, glossy black bead eyes with bright white catchlights, a tiny stitched black nose, and an exaggerated wide crescent grin made of warm ivory teeth divided by vertical stitch lines. content: Using the provided floor plan reference image, convert the 2D black-and-white architectural plan into a clean photorealistic 3D isometric real-estate floor plan render while preserving the original layout, room sizes, labels, and the side-by-side composition of the 1F and 2F plans. Add realistic wall thickness, light wood flooring, soft neutral wall colors, doors and windows with depth, and fully furnished interiors appropriate to each room. Keep all visible Japanese room labels in place, including 1F, 2F, 洗面所, 浴室, 収納, 階段下収納, ホール, 玄関, トイレ, L.D.K (18.0帖), 洋室 (6.0帖) for 2 rooms, ウォークインクローゼット (3.0帖), and 主寝室 (6.0帖). Stage the 1F with 1 kitchen, 1 dining table set for 4, 1 living area with sofa and coffee table, 1 toilet, 1 bathroom with tub, 1 wash area, and small plants. Stage the 2F with 3 sleeping/work rooms total: 1 bedroom with a single bed, 1 room with a desk and chair, and 1 master bedroom with a double bed, plus 2 storage spaces and 1 walk-in closet with shelving. Use a bright catalog-style presentation on a plain light background, viewed from a slightly elevated angled top-down perspective, suitable for a property sales brochure.
title: 2D Floor Plan to 3D Real Estate Render
description: This prompt turns a simple architectural floor plan reference into a furnished 3D isometric real-estate marketing visual while keeping the original layout and labels intact.

content:
Create a clean editorial collage of 6 fashion-and-beauty product campaign visuals on a light gray studio background, arranged in a balanced magazine-style grid with rounded rectangular image blocks and generous white space. Add elegant serif text at the top left reading "GPT image 2.0" with a smaller handwritten script subtitle reading "Prompt Template". Each panel should combine an oversized foreground product held close to the camera with a full-body fashion model in the background, using forced perspective so the product looks much larger than the person. Use sharp studio lighting, soft shadows, glossy commercial retouching, high-end advertising aesthetics, and vibrant color styling.

Panel 1: a close hand holding a tall rectangular pink lip gloss tube with metallic cap, label visible, in front of a female model wearing a bold monochrome red outfit with a red jacket and shiny red pants, standing in a dynamic leaning pose with pink platform heels.

Panel 2: a close hand holding a frosted skincare essence bottle with a black cap, luxury minimalist label, in front of a female model wearing a red tailored pantsuit and red heels, posed in a fashion-forward stride or lunge.

Panel 3: a close hand holding a square bottle of red nail polish with a black cap and luxury branding, in front of a female model wearing a coral pleated midi skirt, teal top or jacket, a dark quilted handbag, and heeled sandals, posed as if walking.

Panel 4: a larger bottom-left hero panel featuring a close hand holding a large white-and-green pump bottle of facial cleanser with pharmacy-style branding, in front of a female model crouching low in green track pants, white crop top, blue jacket, and white sneakers, with a wide-angle fashion pose.

Panel 5: a close hand holding a red glass skincare serum dropper bottle with white text, in front of a female model in a teal satin-like blouse and flowing coral or red skirt, posed in motion.

Panel 6: a close hand holding a white low-top sneaker with a black swoosh, in front of a female model wearing a white cropped jacket, white top, and dark pleated skirt, posed in a graceful editorial stance.

Overall composition should feel like a social-media-ready campaign template for agencies: modern, premium, minimal, stylish, commercial, and highly polished. Keep the background uncluttered, faces intentionally soft or de-emphasized, and emphasize the contrast between the oversized products and the fashion models behind them.
title: Fashion Product Campaign Collage
description: A polished editorial-style collage of six oversized product-and-model ad compositions, ideal for beauty, skincare, and fashion campaign mockups.

content:
A high-resolution commercial marketing photograph featuring the same {argument name="model description" default="young woman with sleek dark hair, now styled in a soft, natural wave"}. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="minimal beige satin top"} and is positioned in a clean, matte ivory studio setting. The composition places a luxury “{argument name="product name" default="LumiSkin Vitamin C Serum"}” dropper bottle prominently in the foreground, held delicately between her fingers at chest level, angled toward the camera for emphasis.

The visual energy is enhanced with vibrant tangerine-orange graphic accents, including flowing liquid streaks and circular glow elements that suggest radiance and hydration. Floating translucent callouts highlight key features such as “brightening boost” and “24h glow hydration” in bold, modern sans-serif typography.

Lighting is soft yet directional, creating a gentle glow on the model’s skin while producing a crisp, reflective shine on the glass serum bottle, emphasizing its premium finish. The serum inside has a rich amber tone that catches the light beautifully. A large, bold headline in the upper left reads: “Why your skin loves it” in bright orange, adding contrast and visual hierarchy.

The overall aesthetic is clean, luminous, and high-end, with a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s confident, natural expression in sharp focus, while the background fades smoothly for a polished, editorial feel.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the layout, scene, and ad-style template, and REFERENCE_1 as the product source, recreate the same 2-panel fashion marketing collage but replace the original dress with the blouse from REFERENCE_1. Keep the beach-and-poolside lifestyle composition from REFERENCE_0: 1 large upper-left close crop, 1 full-body standing shot in the upper-right beach scene, 1 seated poolside shot in the lower-left, and 3 circular fabric/detail callouts stacked vertically on the right. Preserve the overall premium boho summer campaign look, soft natural sunlight, sandy beach, parasol, deck chair, basket accessories, and resort mood. Restyle the product into realistic lifestyle wear: the same red embroidered V-neck blouse from REFERENCE_1 paired with short denim bottoms in the full-body and seated views, while keeping the woman and styling visually consistent across all panels. Replace all headline and feature copy from the reference with new English fashion-ad text, not copied wording: use a large title {argument name="headline text" default="Holiday"} with a smaller script brand word above it, a short 3-line descriptive subtitle, and 3 feature blurbs matching the circular callouts. The 3 feature headings should emphasize neckline, sleeve length, and embroidery details. content: Create a luxury skincare campaign collage in a 4 by 3 editorial grid with exactly 12 tiles, using a warm ivory, cream, champagne, and soft beige palette. The overall mood is ultra-refined, minimal, sensual, and high-end, with milky diffused lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy hydrated skin, and a premium beauty magazine aesthetic. Tile 1: a frosted glass skincare pump bottle standing on a clear shelf, matte cream body, metallic gold pump and collar, elegant serif branding reading {argument name="brand name" default="BLOOMGLOW"}, product name reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE MOISTURIZING EMULSION"}, photographed against a creamy beige wall with diagonal sunlight. Tile 2: a macro swipe of thick white lotion on a smooth cream surface, sculptural texture, soft highlights. Tile 3: a close crop of a woman's head and neck from behind, dark hair in a clean low bun, luminous skin, ear visible, minimal composition. Tile 4: sheer cream curtains lit by sunlight with the shadow silhouette of leaves or flowers cast across them. Tile 5: close-up of a woman's bare shoulder and upper back, dewy glowing skin, one hand touching the shoulder, a thin streak of lotion trailing down the back, intimate skincare editorial framing. Tile 6: a glossy translucent droplet of emulsion resting on a creamy matte surface, macro product texture study. Tile 7: a close crop of the lower face, jawline, neck, and collarbone of the same woman, fingers gently touching the neck, fresh hydrated glow, soft shadow. Tile 8: another macro smear of white cream, smoother and broader than tile 2, with reflective wet highlights. Tile 9: sunlit rippling water in pale champagne tones, abstract liquid texture with sparkling reflections. Tile 10: the same skincare bottle lying diagonally on softly wrinkled satin or silk fabric, gentle sunlight, subtle shadow, branding visible. Tile 11: close-up of hands applying a white oval dollop of lotion onto the back of one hand with the fingertips of the other hand, elegant manicured natural nails. Tile 12: glossy neckline and shoulders of the woman, collarbones highlighted, luminous moisturized skin, dark hair partially visible at the top edge. Keep the composition clean and balanced with thin white dividers between all 12 panels. Style keywords: minimalist luxury, creamy soft light, premium cosmetic advertisement, tactile textures, hydration, skin radiance, cinematic beauty editorial, understated opulence, breathable moisture glow. No clutter, no bright colors, no props beyond bottle, fabric, water, curtains, and skincare textures.
title: Luxury Skincare Editorial Grid
description: A 12-panel cinematic beauty collage for premium skincare branding, ideal for cosmetic ads, campaign moodboards, and luxury product marketing.

content:
Create a clean, high-end Japanese fashion catalog page on a soft warm light-gray background, featuring a coordinated rainwear set laid flat as a product editorial. The central focus is 1 women's hooded raincoat in a muted dusty blue tone, shown front-facing and neatly arranged with sleeves slightly bent inward. The coat is mid-thigh length with a full front zipper, snap-button storm placket details near the collar, a large structured hood, adjustable drawcords at both the hood and waist, two vertical zip pockets, subtle seam construction, and a slightly longer curved back hem with a darker inner lining visible at the bottom opening. Above and to the right, place 1 matching wide-brim rain hat in the same dusty blue, angled slightly, with a darker contrasting brim underside and a small black tag on the crown. Use soft diffused studio lighting with gentle realistic shadows to give a premium product-photography look.

Add editorial typography and callouts around the products in a minimalist Japanese layout. In the upper left, place a small Japanese tagline reading "雨の日も、わたしらしく。" above a large serif English headline reading "OUTDOOR SET UP". Beneath it, add a short vertical block of Japanese body copy describing the stylish functional raincoat-and-hat set. In the lower left, add a serif subheading "DETAILS" with 2 circular inset detail photos stacked vertically: the top circle shows a close-up of the hood and front fastening area with drawcord hardware; the bottom circle shows water droplets beading on the blue waterproof fabric. To the right of each circle, place short Japanese explanatory text. On the right side of the page, add 2 product callout labels in serif English with thin leader lines: "HAT" near the upper-right hat with a short Japanese description below, and "COAT" near the lower-right side of the coat with a short Japanese description below. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with elegant negative space, refined magazine styling, realistic garment textures, and a modern outdoor-luxury aesthetic.
title: Japanese Rainwear Catalog Layout
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese editorial product sheet for a blue raincoat and matching hat, ideal for fashion catalog, brand lookbook, or e-commerce campaign visuals.

content: Create a clean e-commerce mockup on a very light gray background with a simple two-image comparison layout. In the upper right, place 1 small rounded-corner reference photo showing a white fluffy dog from behind, standing on soft light blue fabric and wearing a cream knit pet sweater with pale blue trim. The sweater features a large cartoon dog face patch in brown, black, and white, a red cursive word "Smile," a small red cherry, a blue star, and a yellow crescent moon. Beneath that small reference image, place 1 rounded light-gray text bubble containing Japanese instruction text in black sans-serif: 「画像内のペットを猫に差し替え、元の画像と同じ衣装を着せた状態にする。猫は正面または側面が見える向きで、全身がはっきり見えるようにする。」 In the lower left, place 1 larger rounded-corner final image with a subtle dark border, showing a full-body gray tabby and white cat standing on the same soft light blue fabric backdrop. The cat is facing slightly left but looking directly at the camera, with upright ears, large round eyes, white chest and legs, gray striped back and tail, and a calm alert expression. The cat wears the same cream knitted pet sweater with light blue ribbed trim around the neck, armholes, and hem, fitted neatly around the torso. The sweater artwork matches the reference: the red cursive "Smile" text, a red cherry motif, a blue star, a yellow crescent moon, and a large textured cartoon dog face patch on the side. Lighting is soft and diffuse, like a studio product photo for an online shop, with a realistic fabric texture, minimal shadows, and a polished pet apparel catalog aesthetic.
title: Pet Apparel Replacement Mockup
description: This generates a clean EC-style comparison mockup showing a dog sweater reference and a final product photo of a cat wearing the same outfit, useful for pet clothing listings and promotional visuals.

The glass at the bottom should be only partially visible, transparent, and overflowing from the impact of the splash. Use a high-contrast studio background with a dark deep blue gradient on the left fading to bright white on the right, cinematic rim lighting, crisp reflections, ultra-sharp focus on the tub, and detailed texture in the liquid and cookie crumbs. At the bottom, create a solid orange rectangular banner featuring a cooking pot icon, the text {argument name="usage instructions" default="用法:把汤料清洗干净放入锅中，加入姜片煮20分钟，后加入鸡肉再煮20分钟即可。"}, and a secondary slogan {argument name="bottom slogan" default="天然好料 滋补好汤"}.
title: Herbal Chicken Soup Label Transformation

In the foreground sits a frosted glass serum bottle with a silver pump, displaying the text "{argument name="brand name" default="LUVIN"}" and "{argument name="product name" default="CALMING MOISTURE SERUM"}".
